title: Matchless
writer: Ermanno Donati, Piero Regnoli, Jack Pulman
actors: Patrick O'Neal, Ira von Fürstenberg, Donald Pleasence
plot: A secret agent possesses a ring that makes him invisible for a short time, once every 10 hours. He is in pursuit of an evil criminal mastermind but, at the same time, must evade an enemy agent who also wants the ring.
